text:
* Tian-Jian Barabbas Jiang@Gmail [ Aug 1, 2007 (15:39 )]:

> Tilman Linneweh wrote:
>> Updating to STABLE should be enough. ncursesw was merged to STABLE.
> I updated to 6.2-STABLE and Python 2.5, but the problem of
> "bittorrent-curses | less" is still there. Do you mean 7.0 ?

Hm, maybe it is a python2.5 issue. Because now after updating to  
python 2.5 i see the problem.
